name: token-optimizer-statusline
description: See your Claude Code context health, efficiency, and usage limits in the VS Code status bar.

enumDescriptions: Read cache files written by the Claude Code Token Optimizer plugin (~/.claude/token-optimizer/).
Read cache files written by the GitHub Copilot Token Optimizer install (~/.copilot/token-optimizer/). Requires a Copilot Token Optimizer installation.
tokenOptimizer.runtime.markdownDescription: Which AI coding assistant runtime to read Token Optimizer cache data from. Change this if you use Token Optimizer with GitHub Copilot instead of (or in addition to) Claude Code. Changing this setting takes effect immediately without reloading VS Code.

tokenOptimizer.staleAfterSeconds.markdownDescription: How many seconds before verified statusline usage-limit data is shown as cached. Cached values show their update age; manual refresh also tries a local transcript estimate.
